titleStmt.title: SII 24.147: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 147. (A.R. No. 32 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers an order of Gāṅgēyarāyar fixing the apportionment of the produce from several classes of temple lands, between the temple and its tenants. The record is dated in the 34th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu virābhiṣekamum vijayābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷina śrī tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu kāṅkeyarāyan Olai . Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ koyiṟ śrī kāriyam kulo
ttuṅkaccoḻappirammārāyaṉum śrī vayiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum koyiṟ kaṇakkaṉuṅ kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu . tiruvaraṅkattut tirukkuṟaippaṟṟu śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷum tātanampimārum Aṉupavamāy varukiṟa puncey nilattum Āṟṟuppaṭukaiyilum Ōṭaiyum kuṭṭamum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟilum muppattu
nālāvatu mutal tirutti neṟpayiṟ ceyyalā nilam neṟpayir ceyyavum kamu kuṅ koṭiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa pun payir ceyyalā nilam puṉpayir ceyyavum Itil neṟ payir ceyyu nilattil kārmaṟuvākap payir ceyta nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku kā(r)rukku nūṟṟukkalamum maṟuvukku nūṟṟukkalamum Oru pūppayiṟ ceyta nilattukku
veli Oṉṟukku nūṟṟuk kalamāka vanta nellum Innilattu vampu payiṟ cey yalā nilam payiṟceytu veli Oṉṟukku Aympatin kalamāka vanta nellum ciraṅkappiriyan marakkālāle tirukkoṭṭakārattile Aḷakkavum Ippaṭi Iṟukku miṭattut tiruttip payiṟ ceyta vāṇṭu Ivvoṭṭukku Oṉṟukālum Ita netirāmā
ṇṭu Onṟu pātiyum Itanetirāmāṇṭu Oṉṟu mukkālum Itanetirāmāṇṭu mutal nāmpavum Iṟukkavum kamuku vaikkalā nilamuṅ kamuku vaittu veli Oṉṟukku Iraṇṭāyiramāka vanta kamuku mutal koḷḷavum kamuku Oṉṟukku nāṉūṟāka vanta pākkuk kāyttavāṇṭu mutal kal veṭṭuppaṭiyeNo. 123 above. � Amutupākkukkuṭalāka Eṇṇavum koḻuntiṭal(ni) ni
lam koḻuntiṭa veli Oṉṟukku Iraṇṭāyiramāka vanta kācum punpayir ceyta nilat tukku veli Oṉṟukku nūṟāka vanta kācum śrī paṇṭārattile Oṭukkavum tiruppaḷḷittāmamum maranilaiyumāna nilam tiruppaḷḷittāmamākkip paṟittu Oṭukka vum Innilattukku muṉpilāṇṭukaḷum Iṟuttu varukiṟapaṭiye veli Oṉṟukku
muvāyiramāka vanta vāḻaippaḻam Amutupaṭikku Eṇṇavum In nilattut tirup paḷḷittāmam Ākkiṉa nilam (nikki) nikki niṉṟa nilam Iṭaippāḻp paṭāmal maram vaittākkavum māmaraṅkaḷil Amutu paṭikkup paḻa meṇṇa nīkkiṉa Amutu maranikki nikki niṉṟa māvukkum vaittākkukiṟa mākkaḷ kātta Āṇṭu muta lukku
m pāṭikāval nikki māvoṉṟukku Iraṇṭāka vanta kācum teṅkukkuk kāytta Āṇṭumutal teṅkoṉṟukku Iraṇṭāka vanta kācum Iṟukkavu nūṟu kuḻikku Iraṇṭu pilāmarattil tāḻāmal vaittākki pilākkāy tiru maṭaippaḷḷiyile Eṇṇavum nellimarattukku maramoṉṟukku Irunāḻi yāka vanta nelli tirukkā
kaḷḷiyile Aḷakkavum Immaraṅkaḷ nikki nikki niṉṟa maraṅkaḷukku kaṭamai mutal koḷḷā toḻiyavum Āṟṟuḷavāyp paṭitakkiriyaṅkaḷ nāṇal naṭṭākka kaṭavārkaḷākavum tāṅkaḷ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṭaiyiṭu kuṭuttu Ippaṭi payiṟ ceytu kaṭamai Iṟukkap paṇṇuvatey Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvariti
ṇaikkaḷanāyakam pirampaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai meṉāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 24.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
